common.copyright: © 2025 Legalo Technologies FZ-LLC. All rights reserved.
common.regulatory: Legalo is a licensed marketplace platform operated in the UAE.
common.trustLine: Trusted by 2,400+ licensed lawyers across the UAE
common.headline: Legal help, built for the UAE
common.subheadline: Book regulated lawyers, review fixed-fee services, and get your matter moving — in Arabic or English.
common.heroBadge: Trusted by 2,400+ licensed lawyers across the UAE
common.valuePropsSubtitle: Everything you need to find the right legal help — fast, transparent, and secure.
common.vp1Description: Describe your situation and get matched with the right lawyer in under 90 seconds. Our AI analyzes your case and connects you with specialists who actually handle matters like yours.
common.vp2Description: Every firm on Legalo is licence-verified and escrow-backed. We check RCU registration, trade licence validity, and professional standing before any firm goes live.
common.vp3Description: No hidden fees, no surprise invoices. See fixed-fee pricing upfront, hold funds in escrow until you approve the work, and track every dirham spent.
common.howItWorksSubtitle: From problem to resolution in four simple steps.
common.step1Description: Tell us about your legal matter through our AI-guided intake.
common.step2Description: Our engine instantly analyzes your case and identifies relevant specializations.
common.step3Description: Get matched with the top 3 firms best suited for your specific situation.
common.step4Description: Connect directly, discuss your case, and resolve it with escrow-backed protection.
common.featuredFirmsSubtitle: Top-rated, licence-verified firms across the UAE.
common.testimonialsSubtitle: Real reviews from verified clients across the UAE.
common.ctaSubtitle: Free AI analysis · No commitment · Results in minutes
common.dashboard.client.subtitle: Track your cases, messages, and upcoming deadlines in one place.
common.intake.ai.title: Describe your legal situation
common.intake.ai.subtitle: Our AI will analyze your case and provide instant guidance on the right path forward.
common.intake.ai.label: Your situation
common.intake.ai.placeholder: Describe your legal matter in your own words. Be as specific as possible — we'll use this to match you with the right specialist.
common.intake.ai.complete.title: Analysis complete
common.intake.ai.complete.subtitle: Based on your description, here's what you need to know.
common.intake.manual.step1.title: What type of legal matter?
common.intake.manual.step1.desc: Select the category that best fits your situation.
common.intake.manual.step2.title: Location & language
common.intake.manual.step2.desc: Where is your matter located, and what languages do you prefer?
common.intake.manual.step3.title: Describe your situation
common.intake.manual.step3.desc: Give us enough detail so we can match you with the right specialist.
common.intake.manual.step3.placeholder: Describe the key facts — what happened, when, and what outcome you're seeking.
common.intake.manual.step3.uploadHint: PDF, DOCX, images up to 10 MB
common.intake.manual.step4.title: How would you like to pay?
common.intake.manual.step4.desc: Choose a payment method. All payments are protected by escrow.
common.intake.manual.step4.escrowDesc: Your funds are held securely until you approve the work.
common.intake.manual.step4.escrowNotice: No payment required now — pay only after matching.
common.intake.manual.step4.directDesc: Pay the firm directly, outside the platform.
